results.title: Seven dead after helicopter crash in Qatar waters
results.description: DOHA — Qatar’s Interior Ministry said Sunday that seven people reported missing after a helicopter crash in the country’s territorial waters have been found dead.In a statement, the ministry said search and rescue teams recovered the bodies of seven individuals who were on board the aircraft, confirming their deaths.Earlier, Qatar’s Defense Ministry said the helicopter had suffered a “technical malfunction” during a routine mission before crashing in regional waters, adding there was no indication of hostile action.The incident comes amid heightened regional tensions, with Qatar having faced repeated drone and missile attacks in recent weeks, including strikes on the Ras Laffan Industrial City, one of the world’s largest liquefied natural gas hubs.
keywords: qatar helicopter crash deaths doha search rescue technical malfunction ras laffan tensions middle east news
creator: agencies

results.title: ضبط 7 مقيمين لممارستهم التسول في الرياض
results.description: ضبطت إدارة التحريات والبحث الجنائي بشرطة منطقة الرياض 7 مقيمين من الجنسية الباكستانية لممارستهم التسول، وجرى إيقافهم واتخاذ الإجراءات النظامية بحقهم. وحثّ الأمن العام المتبرعين على توجيه تبرعاتهم عبر المنصات الرسمية المعتمدة بما يضمن وصولها إلى مستحقيها. ويأتي ذلك ضمن الجهود التي تبذلها وزارة الداخلية ممثلة بالأمن العام، في مكافحة ظاهرة التسول بمختلف صورها وأشكالها. تم نشر هذه المقالة ضبط 7 مقيمين لممارستهم التسول في الرياض للمرة الأولي علي صحيفة الوئام .
creator: alyturk

results.title: Iran says it downed F-15 near Hormuz Island
results.description: TEHRAN — Iran claimed Sunday that its air defense systems shot down an F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island in the country’s south, according to the semi-official ISNA news agency.Citing a statement from Iran’s Joint Air Defense Command, ISNA said the warplane was intercepted over the southern coast after it allegedly fired a missile before being targeted by Iranian defenses.No independent confirmation was immediately available, and no details were provided.The claim comes amid escalating regional tensions following the US-Israeli offensive on Iran that began on Feb. 28, which has reportedly killed more than 1,300 people, including Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.Tehran has responded with drone and missile attacks targeting Israel, as well as Jordan, Iraq and Gulf countries, causing casualties and damage to infrastructure while disrupting global markets and aviation.
keywords: iran f15 downed hormuz island air defense isna iran military claim us israel conflict middle east escalation
creator: agencies

results.title: عاجل.. مصدر داخل الاتحاد يكشف لـ الميدان موعد حسم مستقبل كونسيساو
results.description:
كشفت مصادر خاصة للميدان الرياضي، عن مصير سيرجيو كونسيساو المدير الفني لنادي الاتحاد، وذلك في ظل الأمور الخاصة بشأن إمكانية رحيله عن النادي، وعدم استمراره على رأس القيادة الفنية للفريق.

وأكدت مصادر خاصة لـ الميدان الرياضي:" أنه لاتوجد نية حتي هذه اللحظة لإقالة البرتغالي سيرجيو كونسيساو المدير الفني للفريق، مشيراً إلى أنه مع نهاية الموسم، سيتم تقييم مرحلة المدرب مع النادي، وبحث اتخاذ القرار النهائي الخاص باستمراره من عدمه في القيادة الفنية للفريق".

وسيطرت حالة من الغضب على جماهير الاتحاد، وذلك عقب الهزيمة في الدور نصف النهائي لمسابقة كأس الملك، أمام نادي الخلود، والتي أقيمت على ملعب الأخير.

ويعاني الاتحاد، من تراجع في النتائج على مستوي بطولة دوري أبطال أسيا للنخبة، بالإضافة إلى مباريات أخري في دوري روشن للمحترفين.

results.title: Trump calls Democrats ‘greatest enemy’ after ‘death of Iran’
results.description: WASHINGTON — US President Donald Trump on Sunday described the Democratic Party as the “greatest enemy” of the United States, escalating his rhetoric amid a prolonged government shutdown.In a post on his Truth Social platform, Trump said the country’s main threat was now the “Radical Left... Democrat Party,” accusing them of obstructing funding and endangering national security."Now with the death of Iran, the greatest enemy America has is the Radical Left, Highly Incompetent, Democrat Party! Thank you for your attention to this matter," Trump wrote on his social media platform Truth Social.In a separate post, Trump announced that Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents would be deployed to US airports starting Monday to assist Transportation Security Administration (TSA) workers, who have been working without pay during the shutdown.The move comes as the Department of Homeland Security funding standoff continues, with TSA staffing shortages causing disruptions at major airports.Trump said ICE agents would support airport operations and help enforce immigration laws, while blaming Democrats for blocking previously agreed funding measures.The president had earlier warned that ICE deployment would proceed if Democrats refused to end the shutdown, which began in February after both parties failed to reach a funding agreement.Democrats, however, have opposed additional funding for ICE without reforms, citing concerns over enforcement practices and recent controversial operations.Despite the impasse, TSA employees — classified as essential workers — have continued to operate airport security without pay, contributing to rising absenteeism and delays.
keywords: trump democrats greatest enemy ice airports tsa shutdown us politics immigration ice deployment dhs funding crisis
creator: agencies

results.title: بوروسيا دورتموند يعلن رحيل مديره الرياضي كيل
results.description:
أعلن بوروسيا دورتموند المنافس ‌في ‌دوري الدرجة ‌الأولى ⁠الألماني لكرة القدم اليوم ⁠الأحد إنهاء تعاونه مع ⁠المدير ‌الرياضي ‌سيباستيان كيل على الفور.

وأضاف ‌دورتموند ‌أن الطرفين توصلا ‌إلى هذا القرار بالتراضي، ⁠وأن النادي ⁠سيعلن عن خليفة كيل في الوقت المناسب.

ويحتل بوروسيا دورتموند وصافة ترتيب الدوري الألماني برصيد 61 نقطة.
